src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Remove unused RestTemplate bean definition to clean up the application context.
Remove public modifier from bean methods to follow Spring Boot best practices (beans are public by default in Spring context).
Remove public modifier from bean methods to follow Spring Boot best practices.
Remove public modifier from bean methods to follow Spring Boot best practices.
Reformat method chain for setInitParameter to improve readability.
Reorder imports to group standard library imports before third-party imports.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Replace legacy java.text.SimpleDateFormat with java.time.DateTimeFormatter for date formatting.
Rename method from Spanish 'consultarSismos' to English 'searchEarthquakes'.
Refactor synchronous service call to use reactive subscribe pattern.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.general_idea: Refactor instance field to a private static final constant for better encapsulation and immutability.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.after: private static final DecimalFormat DF = new DecimalFormat("#.#");

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.general_idea: Update references to use the renamed static constant.
Remove trailing whitespace at the end of the file.
Replace separate @Getter and @Setter annotations with the combined @Data annotation.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Refactor EarthquakeService from a concrete class to an interface to support reactive programming patterns.
Replace synchronous RestTemplate implementation with reactive Mono return type for earthquake count query.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.before: public EarthquakeCount earthquakeCountQuery(EarthquakeRequest request) throws Exception

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Remove legacy synchronous HTTP client dependencies (RestTemplate, HttpHeaders, etc.) as the service is now an interface.
Remove legacy date/time formatting dependencies (SimpleDateFormat, Calendar, Date) as the service is now an interface.
Add Reactor Core dependency import to support the new reactive return type.
